{
  "sourceCode": "function isEligible(age) {\n  if (age >= 18) {\n    return 'adult';\n  }\n  return 'minor';\n}\n\nmodule.exports = { isEligible };",
  "testCode": "const { isEligible } = require('./eligibility');\n\ndescribe('isEligible', () => {\n  it('returns adult when age is 18 or above', () => {\n    expect(isEligible(20)).toBe('adult');\n  });\n});",
  "coverageResult": {
    "coveredLines": [1, 2, 3],
    "uncoveredLines": [5],
    "coveredBranches": ["age >= 18 true"],
    "uncoveredBranches": ["age >= 18 false"],
    "coveredFunctions": ["isEligible"],
    "uncoveredFunctions": [],
    "coveragePercentage": 75
  },
  "language": "javascript"
}
